plugins.name: preferred-ralph-loops-plugin
plugins.description: Curated re-export of gmickel's flow-next plugin.

plugins.name: preferred-browser-automation-plugin
plugins.description: Curated re-export of Anthropic's official playwright plugin.

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's ubiquitous-language skill. Extract a DDD-style domain glossary from the current conversation, flagging ambiguities and proposing canonical terms.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's handoff skill. Facilitates handoffs between different assistants or tools, ensuring context is preserved and the user's request is fulfilled seamlessly.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's tdd skill. Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop.

plugins.name: domain-modeling
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's domain-modeling skill. Actively build and sharpen a project's domain model — challenge terms, pin down the ubiquitous language, and record architectural decisions (ADRs) as they crystallize.

plugins.name: grilling
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's grilling skill. Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design, one question at a time, to stress-test it before building.

plugins.name: grill-with-docs
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's grill-with-docs skill. A relentless interview to sharpen a plan or design that also writes docs (ADRs + glossary) as it goes — composes /grilling with /domain-modeling.

plugins.name: computer-specs
plugins.description: Profile the running machine's hardware — RAM, CPU(s), GPU(s), and free disk space (cross-platform, read-only) — and report it in plain natural language. Triggers on any 'what are my specs / hardware' question.

plugins.name: dick
plugins.description: Boot Dick Ballsy, a brash, contrarian business-architect advisor who interrogates your business and maintains the business docs (business/strategy/customers/priorities/decisions). Use only when explicitly invoked or accepted from the /init-project hand-off.

plugins.name: init-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a brand-new opinionated mono-repo with preferred defaults (root layout, CLAUDE.md, dev container, standards docs, system.sh dispatcher, a starter .NET solution + Angular SPAs, Postgres + Keycloak, a pre-wired ParleyAI AI client (OpenAI/Anthropic), net10), then optionally hand off to /dick. Asks only for project name + description.

plugins.name: speak
plugins.description: Spoken voice output for Claude responses via the native OS TTS voice (macOS `say`). Cleans markdown before speaking, works locally on the host and — via a host listener — from inside a Dev Container.
